title: SPP Load By BAA Hourly CSV download
description: Hourly Load in SPP by BAA. The SWPW BAA which this dataset makes available became available on 2026-04-01, and thus this dataset does not contain all available historical load data from SPP. If you require load data before 2026, use the `spp_load_hourly` [dataset](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/spp_load_hourly).
